programme.title: Halik sa Hangin
programme.desc: A young woman moves to Baguio, and as she struggles to adapt to her new home, she is torn between two young men who bring passion into her life.

programme.title: Familia Blondina
programme.desc: A young woman leaves her family behind to a marry a soldier in the United States. When her husband passes away, she finds herself back in the Philippines struggling to support her three blonde children.

programme.title: 3Pol Trobol: Huli Ka Balbon!
programme.desc: After discovering an anomaly in his agency, the executive director is ambushed, but he manages to pass on what he knows to Apollo. Before Apollo can report to the authorities, he becomes the primary suspect in killing his former boss.

programme.title: Bcuz of U
programme.desc: A bride tries to win back the man she left at the altar; a lonely woman falls in love with a womanizer; a boy gets attracted to a girl pretending to be a movie star.

programme.title: Extra Service
programme.desc: Three massage therapists become secret agents at night.

programme.title: Samson & Goliath
programme.desc: Cousins Samson and Goliath fall in love with the daughters of their boss. When the two women get kidnapped by an enemy of their family, Samson and Goliath take it upon themselves to rescue them.

programme.title: Isusumbong Kita Sa Tatay Ko
programme.desc: A widower's close relationship with his daughter is tested after he falls in love with a beautiful doctor.

programme.title: Baril Sa Baril
programme.desc: Abel, a convicted inmate, orchestrates a daring escape with fellow inmate Mario. However, their bid for freedom quickly turns into a nightmare when authorities issue a shoot-to-kill order against them.

programme.title: My Candidate
programme.desc: Sonny, a promising young politician, works with Billie, a hotshot image consultant, to improve his senate campaign and soon falls in love with her.

programme.title: Pagpag: Siyam na Buhay
programme.desc: People attend a wake in the Philippines and shake off the spirits of the dead before heading home.

programme.title: Isusumbong Kita Sa Tatay Ko
programme.desc: A widower's close relationship with his daughter is tested after he falls in love with a beautiful doctor.

programme.title: Super Noypi
programme.desc: Six childhood friends find out that their parents are the most-powerful superheroes in the world, but they must band together to rescue the adults who have been kidnapped.

programme.title: Can We Still Be Friends?
programme.desc: Digs and Sam break up and keep tabs on each other's relationships.

programme.title: Askal
programme.desc: Having lived in poverty, a young man decides to help poor people lead a better life and stop them from following the path of crime.

programme.title: Raketeros
programme.desc: Some middle-aged male friends get into a heap of trouble as they try to recover a priceless dress that they lost after a night of partying.

programme.title: Gorio & Tekla
programme.desc: Gorio learns about his half-brother, Tekla, a man from the mountain, after the death of his father. They meet and later fall for the same rich, handsome bachelor.

programme.title: Pulis Patola 2
programme.desc: Two clumsy police officers who are terrible at their jobs decide to take on a gang of criminals to stop them from disrupting the peace in the city.

programme.title: Agent X44
programme.desc: A fledgling agent does everything he can to prove himself when he is assigned to find a stolen dagger once owned by a revered national hero.

programme.title: Lagalag: The Eddie Fernandez Story
programme.desc: Filipino action star Eddie "Lagalag" Fernandez is convicted and jailed for his role in a homicide.

programme.title: Ika-11 Utos: Mahalin Mo, Asawa Mo
programme.desc: Newlywed Soledad learns her husband Roy is psychotic, altering between tenderness and violence when she disobeys his orders.

programme.title: Shake Rattle & Roll 13
programme.desc: Rival witches take over the bodies of two teenagers in "Parola," one of three horror tales; the others are "Tamawo" and "Rain, Rain Go Away.".

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers

programme.desc: In the heart of the Valdees Peninsula, in Patagonia, whales are regularly hunted by a predator whose diminutive size hides its gruesome intentions: the seagull, forcing whales to dive deep into the depths, away from essential oxygen and light.

programme.title: Battle of Midway: The True Story
programme.desc: An inside look at the Battle of Midway, the aircraft used on both sides of the fight, and the dramatic story of one fighter pilot and his pivotal role in America’s first true victory of the Pacific War.

programme.title: Battle of Okinawa in Color
programme.desc: Okinawa was the site of the last battle of the last great war of the 20th century, with a casualty rate in the tens of thousands. Through it all, military cameramen risked their lives to film the conflict, from brutal land combat to fierce kamikaze attacks at sea.

programme.title: Building the Impossible
programme.desc: Rob journeys along the length of the Panama Canal to learn how the un-conquerable Isthmus was bent to the will and skill of determined engineers, creating one of the seven wonders of the Modern World.

programme.title: Aerial Africa
programme.desc: Soar over vast deserts, enormous diamonds, and the world's largest inland oasis.

programme.title: Aerial Africa
programme.desc: Explore the Western Cape's stunning shorelines, dramatic mountains, and richly-diverse metropolis, from thousands of feet in the air.

programme.title: Wild Heroes
programme.desc: This time on Wild Heroes, Little penguin Snapper returns to the colony but will he be accepted? The vet team prepare to treat Samantran tiger Sali, and the Zoo helps to save an endangered native species at risk.

programme.title: Destination China: Yunnan
programme.desc: Destination China will take the audience to some of Yunnan's most beautiful and stunning landscapes and homes to around 6000 species of plants, 200 mammals and 500 species of birds.

programme.title: Destination China: Yunnan
programme.desc: Destination China will take the audience to some of Yunnan's most beautiful and stunning landscapes and homes to around 6000 species of plants, 200 mammals and 500 species of birds.

programme.title: Naledi: A Baby Elephant's Tale
programme.desc: Naledi follows the journey of a baby elephant orphaned in a rescue camp, as the man tasked with her survival races to protect an entire species while fighting to save her life.

programme.title: Sea Hunters
programme.desc: Every spring in Norway, whales use a clever hunting technique called “bubble feeding” to catch quantities of herring. When they spot a shoal of herring, they begin to encircle the herring, periodically releasing streams of bubbles that form a curtain of air, surrounding the fish.

programme.title: Sea Hunters
programme.desc: Marine biologists Eve Jourdain and Richard Kaoliussen have spent two years studying the orcas in Norway, where they have adapted the carrousel technique to their habitat.

programme.title: Sea Hunters
programme.desc: In the depths of the ocean, swift and agile sea lions perform incredible underwater maneuvers to outwit their enemies. Here, on the beaches of Patagonia, as a sea lion pup learns to swim, predators are preparing an attack on him, one that will be fatal.

programme.title: Sea Hunters
programme.desc: Cape Gannets are tough hunters flying over the coasts for their favorite prey: shoals of sardines, waiting for a surprising ally: dolphins.

programme.title: Sea Hunters
programme.desc: Under the burning sun of Cape Cross, large colonies of seals gather on Namibia's Skeleton Coast...The males, who can weigh up to 360 kg, patrol the territory to protect their females and young. But new predators are coming from the land, forcing them to learn new defense behaviors.

programme.title: Sea Hunters
programme.desc: In the heart of the Valdees Peninsula, in Patagonia, whales are regularly hunted by a predator whose diminutive size hides its gruesome intentions: the seagull, forcing whales to dive deep into the depths, away from essential oxygen and light.

programme.title: Sea Hunters
programme.desc: Every spring in Norway, whales use a clever hunting technique called “bubble feeding” to catch quantities of herring. When they spot a shoal of herring, they begin to encircle the herring, periodically releasing streams of bubbles that form a curtain of air, surrounding the fish.

programme.title: Sea Hunters
programme.desc: Marine biologists Eve Jourdain and Richard Kaoliussen have spent two years studying the orcas in Norway, where they have adapted the carrousel technique to their habitat.

programme.title: Sea Hunters
programme.desc: In the depths of the ocean, swift and agile sea lions perform incredible underwater maneuvers to outwit their enemies. Here, on the beaches of Patagonia, as a sea lion pup learns to swim, predators are preparing an attack on him, one that will be fatal.

programme.title: Aging in the Wild
programme.desc: What does it take to maintain alpha status as animals grow older? We investigate the responsibilities and challenges that come with being a senior leader of a pack.

programme.title: Gold Rush (Specials) (S16)
programme.desc: Join us for a countdown of Gold Rush fans' top 10 favorite moments across fifteen seasons of Gold Rush. Which one will be Number One?

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold (S9)
programme.desc: As an arctic blizzard wreaks havoc across Nome, Kris finds gold under the ice but fire erupts overhead. Shawn struggles to rescue his operation.

programme.title: 6000-LB. Shark
programme.desc: With reports of enormous fat white sharks appearing off the coast of New Zealand, scientists Tom Hird and Leigh de Necker set out to find one of these behemoths.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown (S10)
programme.desc: Josh joins a daring experiment to replicate the ancient pyramid build. First-of-their-kind 3D scans reveal an undiscovered void beneath the stone.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid (S6)
programme.desc: Two renovators have purchased land in a remote part of Colorado. They plan on using a rammed-earth process to construct all-natural walls.

programme.title: Otto Bulletproof - Facing the Unknown (S2)
programme.desc: On his final leg in Africa Otto struggles as tropical rainfall make progress difficult and drinking water becomes scarce.

programme.title: The Last Woodsmen (S1)
programme.desc: Jared fights to get a fat truck running at Grizz. Chris and Jeff search for hard-to-reach money trees. Dave braves the deadly waters of Grizzly River.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Mine Rescue with Freddy & Juan (S4)
programme.desc: A BC miner fights to set up a legacy mine for his son, located beside the gold-rich Fraser River.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold (b) (S13)
programme.desc: Tensions explode on the Tomcod Claim! Chris takes radical action against a dredge he believes is jumping his claim.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown (S10)
programme.desc: Josh Gates investigates unsolved stories across the globe. He interviews key eyewitnesses and uncovers recent developments before exploring.

programme.title: Dual Survival (S4)
programme.desc: Watch Dual Survival as their hosts demonstrate survival skills in a variety of hypothetical scenarios in wilderness around the world.

programme.title: Otto Bulletproof - Facing the Unknown (S2)
programme.desc: In the Everglades of Florida, Otto and Pascal Feyh hunt an invasive species of snake, the Burmese python, which can grow up to five metres long.

programme.title: The Last Woodsmen (S1)
programme.desc: As fire season approaches, Jared races to save as many logs as he can. Plus, the road crew blasts its way to one last stand of money trees.

programme.title: Ed Stafford's Rite of Passage (S1)
programme.desc: Ed travels to the Ecuadorian rainforest to meet the Waorani, hunting monkeys and crocodiles, making poison blow-darts.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People (S7)
programme.desc: Noah must complete a tricky barter to secure an ideal Alaskan home. Back on Mosman Island, the emotion of the Alaskan trip takes its toll on Rain.

programme.title: Australian Story - Episode 14
programme.desc: In 2026, Logie-award-winning documentary program Australian Story celebrates 30 years sharing compelling stories about real people that illuminate, entertain and inspire. The power of the personal. Presented by Leigh Sales.

programme.title: Great Australian Walks - The Riesling Trail
programme.desc: Susie heads to South Australia's renowned wine region, walking the contours of a disused railway track from Auburn to Clare, while hearing stories of women's survival and tasting wine from the valley's first viticulturalists.

programme.title: Dreaming Big - Episode 2
programme.desc: Dreaming Big is a documentary about gifted Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander youths on the cusp of becoming Australia's next generation of sports stars.

programme.title: Gardening Australia - Episode 14
programme.desc: Inspiring, entertaining and full of practical advice, join Costa Georgiadis and the team as they unearth gardening ideas, meet avid gardeners and look at some of the most inspiring gardens from across the country.

programme.title: Landline - Episode 14
programme.desc: A tasty sampler of stories from the land - covering food, agriculture, crops, climate, business and innovation - as we meet the fascinating people who make our rural and regional communities unique. Presented by Pip Courtney.

programme.title: Planet America - Episode 17
programme.desc: As Trump steamrolls through the second year of his second term, Chas and John are here to guide you through the mayhem: covering Iran, ICE, tariffs, NATO, Russia/Ukraine, Gaza, affordability, Greenland, the midterms and more.

programme.title: ABC News with Joe O'Brien - Episode 104
programme.desc: Joe O'Brien brings you a comprehensive summary of the day's events, with the latest breaking news, in depth coverage of the top stories, live crosses, interviews and explainers to bring you up to speed on what's going on.

programme.title: A Bite to Eat with Alice - Benjamin Law
programme.desc: Writer Benjamin Law brings in his all-time favourite, ginger for a dessert, then Alice introduces Benjamin to the joys of a rissole.

programme.title: Dr Ann's Secret Lives - Turtles
programme.desc: Dr Ann Jones heads to Rosemary Island, WA to join turtle scientists on their annual nest survey. It's hot work, but worth it - females laying eggs; flatback hatchlings, and she even wrestles a Green Turtle.

programme.title: ABC National News - Episode 146
programme.desc: There's never been a more important time for transparency and trust. ABC News brings you the day's top stories and latest news, with more reporters to tell you what's going on and why it matters. Presented by Joe O'Brien.

programme.title: 7.30 - Episode 82
programme.desc: Sarah Ferguson presents Australia's premier daily current affairs program, delivering agenda-setting public affairs journalism and interviews that hold the powerful to account. Plus political analysis from Jacob Greber.

programme.title: Australian Story - Episode 14
programme.desc: In 2026, Logie-award-winning documentary program Australian Story celebrates 30 years sharing compelling stories about real people that illuminate, entertain and inspire. The power of the personal. Presented by Leigh Sales.

programme.title: Dreaming Big - Episode 2
programme.desc: Dreaming Big is a documentary about gifted Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander youths on the cusp of becoming Australia's next generation of sports stars.

programme.title: The World - Episode 82
programme.desc: There's never been a more important time to stay in touch with what's happening in our world. Girish Sawlani presents the latest international news from ABC News correspondents as well as interviews with experts and guests.

programme.title: Dr Karl's How Things Work - Toilet Paper
programme.desc: The battle for bog roll during the Covid 19 years showed us just how much we Aussies value the stuff. In this episode Dr Karl lifts the lid to discover how recycled toilet paper is made at the Encore toilet paper factory.

programme.title: ABC Late News - Episode 104
programme.desc: End your day with the latest on the day's top stories. ABC News has reporters across Australia and around the globe to uncover what's happening and why it matters. Presented by Michael Tetlow in Perth.

programme.title: The Business - Episode 66
programme.desc: Australia's leading daily business and finance show, bringing you up to date on market moves, economic trends and the forces affecting consumers, employees and business owners big and small. Presented by Kirsten Aiken.

programme.desc: Sarah Ferguson presents Australia's premier daily current affairs program, delivering agenda-setting public affairs journalism and interviews that hold the powerful to account. Plus political analysis from Jacob Greber.

programme.title: Kampong Ties - EP 17 甘榜情
programme.desc: Shuixian is forced by her foster mother to marry Lihai, whom later died in an accident, leaving Shuixian a young widow. Yueman is married to Jiaqing, an abusive man. One day, Shuixian accidentally kills Jiaqing but is saved by Yueman who claims Jiaqing was killed by his creditors. Both of them leave the village and meet Youbao, head of a secret society.

programme.title: Kampong Ties - EP 18 甘榜情

programme.desc: This drama is set in the Jiufen area from the 1960s to the 1970s. It tells the story of how three brothers conquered the world with their bare hands. programme.title: Forbidding No More - EP 6 极境之旅
programme.desc: Iran, Cuba or North Korea are not exactly the most accessible countries. In fact most would balk at the idea of holidaying there. Stringent visa requirements and hard travel conditions are but some factors. But are they really inaccessible? "Forbidding No More" takes us to these countries to explore what culture and attractions these locations have to offer.

programme.title: News Tonight 晚间新闻
programme.desc: Daily evening updates on top local news and world news.

programme.title: My One And Only - EP 7 只此一家
programme.desc: Mr. Lin reveals his guilt over his daughter's death to Renpin. Limin asks Robert why he's in a rush to sell his house and believes him when he says that he wants to take his godmother traveling. Renpin asks Wan Zixiong to help Mr. Lin move on. Zixiong pretends to sense the spiritual presence of Mr. Lin's daughter. Unbeknownst to them, someone is secretly filming everything.

programme.title: The Fading Gold - EP 1 金式森林
programme.desc: Fang International Chairman Fang Yangtian and his mother, Mdm Fang Lu Chaoqun, clash in court over the establishment of a family trust. A year earlier, director Kuang Weiliang purchased a special-edition piece from Zhongda Jewellery, only to discover it was fake, and vented his anger on Yangtian’s eldest son, Fang Xueli.

programme.title: Talk of The Town - EP 40 狮城热话
programme.desc: A half-hour talk-show segment in Hello Singapore which brings together diverse voices and expert opinions to thought-provoking discussions on wide range of issues. Incorporating online polls which gather public opinions, the segment creates a space that allows for multi viewpoints in the studio from Monday to Friday.

programme.title: Heroes in White - EP 24 侠医
programme.desc: Yanzu assaults Shikeng, prompting Weimin to treat Ma Yixiang’s injuries in exchange for the charges being dropped. Meanwhile, Jinju suffers a stroke, causing Jingzhi to break down under the pressure of caregiving.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 286
programme.desc: Elevate your kitchen with Germany-made Fissler Stardust Forte! Sleek and durable, its 10-layer titanium Protectal non-stick coating keeps even heavily seasoned dishes from sticking or burning. Ergonomic handles offer a comfortable, secure grip, while no-drip rims prevent spills. The CookStar base works on all stoves—including induction—for even, effortless cooking. It is the perfect choice for a modern, premium kitchen.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 304
programme.desc: The Hoto Kitchen Spin Scrubber combines power and precision in a compact, cordless design made for everyday kitchen cleaning. Equipped with a high speed motor and built in rechargeable battery, it removes grease, stains and buildup from sinks, stovetops and countertops effortlessly.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 251
programme.desc: The X-Fold Exercise Bike is a compact, foldable exercise bike designed for small spaces, offering adjustable resistance, an LCD display and Mobile App connectivity for your workout. Its space-saving design makes it ideal for convenient home cardio sessions.

programme.title: 100% Wife - EP 8 金家好媳妇
programme.desc: Qiuyi has done the chores given by Xiaoli. Huiping praises Qiuyi, which makes Xiaoli feel threatened. Xinru finds the door unlocked and thinks that there is a burglar in the house.

programme.title: 100% Wife - EP 9 金家好媳妇
programme.desc: When Guanting learns that the construction site has been dumped with waste, he rushes there but is threatened by Brother Bao. A drunken Zhenghui asks Qiuyi for money and beats her up when he can't get any.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 312

As they do, they are pursued by the Explorers, a mysterious organization seeking Liko's pendant for unknown reasons.

programme.title: My Best Friend's An Animal - EP 1
programme.desc: MY BEST FRIEND'S AN ANIMAL is an emotive, heart-warming series which tells the stories of humans who have unlikely and extraordinary friendships with wild animals. Featuring 6 compelling stories per episode and filmed all over the world. The series proves that when it comes to friendship, shape, size, or even species is irrelevant. Respect, trust, and understanding can be found in the most surprising places.

programme.title: Nine Lives
programme.desc: A stuffy businessman finds himself trapped inside the body of his family's cat.

programme.title: Rita Ora at the Eiffel Tower

A kaleidoscope of the past, present and future, Rita performs global hits like Anywhere, Lonely Together alongside tracks from her EP Bang.

programme.title: Magic Camp
